Petition To Approve Actions Taken By Co-Executors
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-16-2022 Continued To Jun-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-16-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-22-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance required. Pro forma hearing only for purposes of admitting will.

This matter is on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will, the Court noting that notice of the proceedings appears to be complete and that no objection has been made to the Petition. The Court grants the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Will dated November 1, 2019 is admitted to probate. Douglas Moriarty and Katie Tirrell are appointed the Co-Executors of the estate with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. Bond is set at $53,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on March 16, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Ruiz; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
